index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Procedural Alien Rock – Three.js</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./style.css">

  </head>
    
  <body>
  <!-- Input for loading rock texture -->
    <input type="file" id="textureInput" accept="image/*" style="display: none;">

    <script type="importmap">
        {
            "imports": {
                "three": "https://unpkg.com/three@0.160.0/build/three.module.js",
                "three/addons/": "https://unpkg.com/three@0.160.0/examples/jsm/",
                "simplex-noise": "https://unpkg.com/simplex-noise@4.0.1/dist/esm/simplex-noise.js"
            }
        }
    </script>
    <script type="module" src="./script.js"></script>

  </body>
  
</html>
